concepts.name: Number Theory
concepts.description: Factors and primes. Finding factors, identifying prime numbers and perfect squares, counting factors, and incremental search.

concepts.name: Sequences & Patterns
concepts.description: Number patterns and finite sequences. Comparing successive terms, finding first differences, recognizing constant or growing differences, and predicting the next term.

concepts.name: Rates, Units & Proportional Reasoning
concepts.description: Unit rate and work rate problems. Unit conversion, computing rooms per hour or hours per room, and proportional reasoning.

concepts.name: Statistics & Averages
concepts.description: Arithmetic mean and weighted averages. Total sum divided by count, weighted totals, and translating word problems into average calculations.

concepts.name: Algebra: Linear Equations
concepts.description: Solving linear equations. Combining like terms, applying inverse operations, handling variables on both sides, and integer and fraction arithmetic.

concepts.name: Algebra: Expression Evaluation & Equivalent Forms
concepts.description: Evaluating expressions and recognizing equivalent forms. Substitution, exponent rules, square of a binomial, and difference of squares as an answer-choice trap.

concepts.name: Algebra: Translating Words to Equations
concepts.description: Translating words into equations. Naming the unknown variable, converting verbal phrases to symbols, building one-variable linear equations, and applying the distributive property.

concepts.name: Inequalities & Number Lines
concepts.description: Inequalities and number lines. Compound inequalities, open and closed endpoints, interval notation and boundaries, and number line interpretation.

concepts.name: Algebra: Literal Equations & Rearranging Formulas
concepts.description: Literal equations and rearranging formulas. Solving for a variable, isolating variables, factoring out common factors, and dividing by a coefficient or expression.

concepts.name: Functions: Evaluation & Substitution
concepts.description: Evaluating functions. Function notation, inputs and outputs, substituting values, evaluating polynomial and linear functions, and quotient of function values.

concepts.name: Coordinate Geometry: Slope
concepts.description: Slope in the coordinate plane. Slope formula, rate of change, rise over run, lines through two points, and negative slope.

concepts.name: Geometry: Area & Unit Tiling
concepts.description: Area of rectangles and unit tiling. Composite area, tile and sod coverage, unit area conversion, and dividing by tile area.

concepts.name: Geometry: Squares, Area & Right Triangles
concepts.description: Squares, area, and right triangles. Square area, finding side length from area, diagonal as hypotenuse, special right triangles, and the Pythagorean theorem.

concepts.name: Geometry: Similar Triangles & Proportions
concepts.description: Similar triangles and proportions. Corresponding sides, proportional side lengths, scale factor, and SSS/SAS/AA similarity criteria.

concepts.name: Trigonometry: Right Triangle Ratios
concepts.description: Right-triangle trigonometry. SOH-CAH-TOA, cosine and adjacent over hypotenuse, secant as the reciprocal of cosine, and identifying triangle sides.
